name: NVIDIA UVM Slab Leak
regex: (?i)(?:BUG \S+.*Objects remaining|Slab cache still has objects when called from deinit_chunk)

name: Container Layer Failure
regex: (?i)(failed to register layer|layer does not exist)

name: NVMe I/O Error
regex: (?i)(?:I/O error, dev nvme\d+n\d+|nvme nvme\d+: I/O error)

name: Hung Task
regex: (?i)INFO: task .+ blocked for more than \d+ seconds
